fixes.cause: File-per-process pattern creating excessive files, overwhelming metadata servers
fixes.fix: Use shared files with MPI-IO collective I/O. For checkpointing, use HDF5 or ADIOS2 for structured shared-file output.

io_functions.posix_shared: write(fd, buf, nbytes)  /* shared file, POSIX */

fixes.cause: File-per-process pattern creating excessive files, overwhelming metadata servers
fixes.fix: Use shared files with MPI-IO collective I/O. For checkpointing, use HDF5 or ADIOS2 for structured shared-file output.

io_functions.posix_shared: write(fd, buf, nbytes)  /* shared file, POSIX */

fixes.cause: I/O operations with very small transfer sizes (<1MB), causing excessive system call overhead
fixes.fix: Increase transfer/buffer size to >=1MB. For POSIX: aggregate small writes into large buffers. For MPI-IO: use collective I/O with larger datatypes.
fixes.code_before: for (i=0; i<n; i++) write(fd, buf, 64);  /* 64B per call */

fixes.cause: File-per-process pattern creating excessive files, overwhelming metadata servers
